mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room ( room_type, room_name, room_description, created_by, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( COALESCE(#{roomType}, 'GROUP'), #{roomName}, #{roomDescription}, #{createdBy}, COALESCE(#{deletedYn}, 'N') )

INSERT INTO chat_room_member ( room_id, member_id, joined_at, hidden_at, left_at, last_read_at, last_read_message_id, is_active, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{memberId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), NULL, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), ( SELECT MAX(message_id) FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ), 1, COALESCE(#{deletedYn}, 'N') ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE joined_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), hidden_at = NULL, left_at = NULL, last_read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), last_read_message_id = ( SELECT MAX(message_id) FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ), is_active = 1, deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_room SET deleted_yn = 'Y' WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM chat_room_member crm WHERE crm.room_id = #{roomId} AND crm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND crm.left_at IS NULL AND crm.is_active = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.room_type AS roomType, r.room_name AS roomName, r.room_description AS roomDescription, r.created_by AS createdBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, r.deleted_yn AS deletedYn, COALESCE(mc.member_count, 0) AS memberCount, latest.last_message AS lastMessage, latest.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, 0 AS unreadCount FROM chat_room r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) AS member_count FROM chat_room_member WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' AND left_at IS NULL AND is_active = 1 GROUP BY room_id ) mc ON mc.room_id = r.room_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(created_at), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS last_message_at, SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT(content ORDER BY created_at DESC, message_id DESC SEPARATOR '|||'), '|||', 1 ) AS last_message FROM chat_message WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY room_id ) latest ON latest.room_id = r.room_id WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId} AND r.deleted_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT rm.room_member_id AS roomMemberId, rm.room_id AS roomId, rm.member_id AS memberId, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.name) AS memberName, m.email AS email, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, DATE_FORMAT(rm.joined_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS joinedAt, DATE_FORMAT(rm.hidden_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS hiddenAt, DATE_FORMAT(rm.left_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS leftAt, rm.last_read_message_id AS lastReadMessageId, DATE_FORMAT(rm.last_read_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS lastReadAt, rm.is_active AS isActive, rm.deleted_yn AS deletedYn FROM chat_room_member rm JOIN members m ON m.member_id = rm.member_id WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId} AND rm.member_id = #{memberId} AND rm.deleted_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT rm.room_member_id AS roomMemberId, rm.room_id AS roomId, rm.member_id AS memberId, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.name) AS memberName, m.email AS email, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, DATE_FORMAT(rm.joined_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS joinedAt, DATE_FORMAT(rm.hidden_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS hiddenAt, DATE_FORMAT(rm.left_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS leftAt, rm.last_read_message_id AS lastReadMessageId, DATE_FORMAT(rm.last_read_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS lastReadAt, rm.is_active AS isActive, rm.deleted_yn AS deletedYn FROM chat_room_member rm JOIN members m ON m.member_id = rm.member_id WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId} AND rm.member_id = #{memberId} AND rm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND rm.left_at IS NULL AND rm.is_active = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT rm.room_member_id AS roomMemberId, rm.room_id AS roomId, rm.member_id AS memberId, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.name) AS memberName, m.email AS email, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, DATE_FORMAT(rm.joined_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS joinedAt, DATE_FORMAT(rm.hidden_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS hiddenAt, DATE_FORMAT(rm.left_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS leftAt, rm.last_read_message_id AS lastReadMessageId, DATE_FORMAT(rm.last_read_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS lastReadAt, rm.is_active AS isActive, rm.deleted_yn AS deletedYn FROM chat_room_member rm JOIN members m ON m.member_id = rm.member_id WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId} AND rm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND rm.left_at IS NULL AND rm.is_active = 1 ORDER BY rm.joined_at ASC, rm.room_member_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_member WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND left_at IS NULL AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message ( room_id, sender_id, content, message_type, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{messageType}, 'MESSAGE'), #{createdAt}, COALESCE(#{deletedYn}, 'N') )

INSERT INTO chat_message ( room_id, sender_id, content, message_type, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{messageType}, 'SYSTEM'), #{createdAt}, COALESCE(#{deletedYn}, 'N') )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET deleted_yn = 'Y' WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT cm.message_id AS messageId, cm.room_id AS roomId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.name) AS senderName, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, cm.content AS content, DATE_FORMAT(cm.created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, cm.deleted_yn AS deletedYn, cm.message_type AS messageType, CASE WHEN cm.message_type = 'SYSTEM' THEN 'CHAT_SYSTEM' ELSE 'CHAT_MESSAGE' END AS eventType, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_member crm WHERE crm.room_id = cm.room_id AND crm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND crm.left_at IS NULL AND crm.is_active = 1 AND crm.member_id <> cm.sender_id AND ( crm.last_read_message_id IS NULL OR crm.last_read_message_id < cm.message_id ) ) AS unreadCount FROM chat_message cm JOIN members m ON m.member_id = cm.sender_id WHERE cm.message_id = #{messageId} AND cm.deleted_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT cm.message_id AS messageId, cm.room_id AS roomId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.name) AS senderName, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, cm.content AS content, DATE_FORMAT(cm.created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, cm.deleted_yn AS deletedYn, cm.message_type AS messageType, CASE WHEN cm.message_type = 'SYSTEM' THEN 'CHAT_SYSTEM' ELSE 'CHAT_MESSAGE' END AS eventType, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_member crm WHERE crm.room_id = cm.room_id AND crm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND crm.left_at IS NULL AND crm.is_active = 1 AND crm.member_id <> cm.sender_id AND ( crm.last_read_message_id IS NULL OR crm.last_read_message_id < cm.message_id ) ) AS unreadCount FROM chat_message cm JOIN members m ON m.member_id = cm.sender_id
JOIN chat_room_member rm ON rm.room_id = cm.room_id AND rm.member_id = #{memberId} AND rm.deleted_yn = 'N'
WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} AND cm.deleted_yn = 'N'
AND rm.left_at IS NULL AND rm.is_active = 1 AND (rm.joined_at IS NULL OR cm.created_at >= rm.joined_at) AND (rm.hidden_at IS NULL OR cm.created_at > rm.hidden_at)
ORDER BY cm.created_at ASC, cm.message_id ASC
